raw.question: Investigate export timeout relative to hard bootstrap timeout
raw.chosen: Investigate export timeout relative to hard bootstrap timeout
raw.reasoning: PR clamps export timeout below idle watchdog but bootstrap hard-cap mode can still cancel the parent before the export sub-deadline, preventing same-cycle tree fallback.

events.content: Clamp export timeout below hard bootstrap caps and narrow 429 fallback: Clamp export timeout below hard bootstrap caps and narrow 429 fallback

raw.question: Clamp export timeout below hard bootstrap caps and narrow 429 fallback
raw.chosen: Clamp export timeout below hard bootstrap caps and narrow 429 fallback
raw.reasoning: A positive BootstrapTimeout can otherwise cancel the parent context before the export sub-deadline fires, and only workspace_busy 429s are evidence that the atomic export path is the overloaded component.

events.content: Reviewed PR export fallback changes, fixed hard-cap timeout race and narrowed 429 fallback to workspace_busy; full Go tests and vet passed locally.

retrospective.summary: Reviewed PR #223 export fallback changes; fixed export timeout clamping for hard bootstrap caps, narrowed 429 fallback to workspace_busy, added regression coverage, and verified go test ./... plus go vet ./... with a temporary Go 1.22 toolchain.
